title: Arisarum serpentrium
intro: Arisarum vulgare, also known as the snake's tongue or serpent's tongue, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Arum. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which may aid in wound healing and reducing the severity of certain infections. The bioactive constituents of Arisarum vulgare include alkaloids, such as caulescine, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Arisarum vulgare is often prepared as a tincture or infusion, and is used to treat various ailments, including skin conditions and respiratory issues.
